name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Standard spinners
description: Loader set with classic circular and ring spinner animations.

name: Dots
description: Loader set with dot-based loading animations with bounce or pulse motion.

name: Bars
description: Loader set with bar loaders with vertical or horizontal activity motion.

name: Blocks
description: Loader set with block and square loaders with stepped movement patterns.
